summary: W1458 refines the W1457 W987 construction by splitting the bundled W722 source-triangulation input into a source pretriangulated structure, source triangulated structure, and source triangle-completion input, constructing W722, then feeding the resulting W1457 input to assemble W719, W948, W949, W950, W984, W717, W716, W730, W986, and W987 with projection theorems back to those source-triangulation, fixed-target, endpoint, target, relation, and boundary fields. Product success remains false because no positive OriginalFourTaskProductSuccess witness exists and the final imported original four-task completion surface still proves productSuccessClaimed=false.
known_gaps: Positive Lean witness is absent: ProductSuccessDeclarations.lean does not import or check an OriginalFourTaskProductSuccess surface with field-level evidence for the four original tasks.
Final imported completion surface remains nonterminal: originalFourTaskContractCompletion.productSuccessClaimed = false still compiles.

Original four mathematical tasks remain open under the positive-witness supplement; W1458 constructs W987 from two raw boundary fields, two raw relation fields, W944 target no-univ data, W973 closed-embedding closedness data, a normalized lift blueprint, target fixed-target uniqueness, localization-model fixed-target uniqueness, source pretriangulated structure, source triangulated structure, source triangle-completion input, endpoint strict-exact witnesses, and W945 localized-unit data rather than proving those inputs from a positive product witness.
remaining_work: Continue Lean implementation toward a positive OriginalFourTaskProductSuccess-style declaration backed by actual exact-category, metrizable LCA exact-category, Yoneda-Ext, and bounded derived infinity-category constructions.

Discharge the W1458 raw boundary-field, raw relation-field, W944, W973, normalized lift blueprint, target fixed-target uniqueness, localization-model fixed-target uniqueness, source pretriangulated, source triangulated, triangle-completion, endpoint strict-exact, and W945 construction inputs with real Lean constructions satisfying the positive-witness supplement, or replace them with an explicit positive witness.
Before any future product-success claim, rerun the source-contradiction gate, negative fixtures, clean checkout verification, root external audit, and clean-extracted packet audit.
